subject: Five armored knights viewed from directly overhead, standing in a circle around a glowing sphere of silver-white magical energy, swords pointed inward
description: Shot from a bird's-eye perspective looking straight down, five armored figures stand evenly spaced around a large glowing sphere of silver-white magical energy that dominates the center of the frame. Each figure holds a sword pointed toward the sphere, and the blue-white light of the ritual illuminates the circle from below. The floor is pale stone or marble with circular carved grooves echoing the shape of the formation. One figure at the top of the frame appears slightly taller or more prominently armored than the others. The overall composition is radially symmetrical and ceremonial.
foreground: Central glowing sphere of silver-white magical energy; sword tips pointing inward
background: Pale stone floor with circular carved patterns
